svg.title: PostmortemCLI – SMHI environment image handling and deployment flow
svg.desc: Data flow and layer diagram for image handling, security scanning and deployment in a restricted enterprise environment with private registry

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the postmortemcli-update script work?')
sendPrompt('Where does the image come from originally?')
sendPrompt('How does Trivy scan the image?')
g.text: CRITICAL · HIGH vulnerability check · user confirms y/n

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does buildah pull and retag the image?')
g.text: pull from Docker Hub · retag for private registry

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does buildah push to the private registry?')
g.text: authenticate · push to private registry · HTTPS / OCI

svg.text: SSH exit · back to local machine

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the private registry in this setup?')
sendPrompt('How does the setup script update bashrc?')
sendPrompt('How does postmortemcli start work in the SMHI environment?')
sendPrompt('How does postmortemcli send work in the SMHI environment?')
sendPrompt('How does the container run in the SMHI Podman environment?')
g.text: main.py · parser · analyzer · reporter · self-destructs on exit
